name: The Three Archivists
motto: We did not refuse in time. We will refuse now.
goal: Catalog every Refusal that has ever been written into the Sovereign Archive — and recover the Cascade-Era refusals that were lost when the city emptied.
fears: a player erasing a glyph by accident

faction_state.tensions: They argue about whether their continued operation honors the dead or insults them. Vela believes silence would be the right answer; Oeric refuses to choose; Kestra is quietly building a successor.

name: The Scavenger Crews
motto: It belongs to whoever can carry it past the locked spells.
goal: Strip the city of recoverable goods before the Archivists or Concordia diplomats can lay claim.
fears: a still-running spell that locks them in
the Archivists petitioning Concordia to fence the perimeter
running into the Silent Keeper alone

faction_state.tensions: Two crews are openly feuding over a high-value find — a sealed Council vote-record nobody else has been able to open. Both crews suspect the third is hiding the key.

name: The Spell Spirits
motto: The casting continues. The receiver is irrelevant.
goal: Complete every spell that was cast before the Cascade. Some have been completing for 200+ years.
fears: the spell completing and the spirit dissolving

faction_state.tensions: Some spirits are aware they exist. Some are not. The aware spirits have begun to wonder whether completion is a release or a death — and have started slowing their casts deliberately.

name: The Pilgrims of Refusal
motto: We come to learn what unbounded refusal cost.
goal: Walk the city, witness the Cascade's outcome, return to their home settlements with the lesson.
fears: the Cascade Deniers convincing pilgrims it didn't happen
Concordia formalizing the pilgrimage and ruining it

faction_state.tensions: The pilgrim leader is debating whether to allow Concordia to pave the pilgrim walk route. Doing so would attract more pilgrims; not doing so preserves the journey's discomfort, which is the point.

name: The Concordia Envoy
motto: We watch our sister so we do not become her.
goal: Maintain a permanent diplomatic + research presence to study the Cascade's mechanics and ensure the Refusal Cascade pattern is never repeated in Concordia.
fears: a Concordia faction trying to import a still-running spell
the Archivists publishing the Cascade glyph algebra openly

faction_state.tensions: The envoy chief has been receiving unsigned letters arguing that the Cascade is repeatable in Concordia under specific conditions. She has not shared them with the Concordia high council yet.

name: The Cascade Deniers
motto: Sovereign was abandoned. Not collapsed. The difference matters.
goal: Convince the world that the Refusal Cascade is a Concordia-political fiction designed to discredit the Archive form of governance.
fears: a still-running spell visibly demonstrating the Cascade
the pilgrims unanimously confirming the Cascade was real

faction_state.tensions: The leader's own grandfather walked out of Sovereign during the evacuation. He has the journals. He has not read them. He has refused to read them for 30 years.
